eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Douglas, WA; at 4:08 PM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 8:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 evacuation
This area is a Level 3 Fire Evacuation-"GET OUT NOW"
Douglas County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 3 Fire Evacuation near Orondo.

The affected area is Beebe Ranch Rd, N. Shore Dr, E. Shore Dr, Fredrick Ct, River Glen Dr, S. Shore Dr, Rockhill Rd, Hillrange Ln, Pine Bluffs Ln, Herring Ln, Columbia River Bluffs Rd, Wolf Holler Rd, Long Draw Rd, Rd 20 NW/Peach Rd,  Rd D NW (between Rd 20 NW and Rd 15 NW) and 1700 block of Rd E NW

***the fire has jumped the middle of McNeil Canyon Rd-if you live on the upper half, exit the top of the canyon, if you live on the lower half, exit the lower part of the canyon***

***Red Cross Shelter is set up at 324 East Johnson Avenue in Chelan***

You will be kept advised as conditions change. Please monitor local radio/social media, the Douglas County Incident Map and the Douglas County Sheriff's Office Facebook page for updates.

Douglas County Sheriff's Facebook:
https://www.facebook.com/DouglasCountySheriffsOfficeWA/

EM Interactive Map at https://www.douglascountysheriff.org/870/Sheriff
or
